programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mike Glover, Green Beret and retired CIA operative, joins Don to kick it up a notch for our contestants. What would Surviving Mann be without some log PT? If it’s good enough for the Seals - it’s good enough for our contestants. If that wasn’t hard enough, Don and Mike have the contestants do some tire pulling, a run, tug of war, land nav and a Tyrolean traverse over alligator infested water. Oh, and did we mention the 40mph wind and rain storm?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Aftermath hosts Chris and Cindy sit down with contestants Caleb and Jen to discuss one of the hardest days in Surviving Mann history. Caleb gives insight on his tug of war strategy.. which took inspiration from an unusual source. Next, Dr. Jeff West gives us the scoop about his life changing product. In the same vein, Eric from Nutrient Survival goes over what his company is doing for soldiers and civilians alike.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: And then there were two! Prepare for a roller coaster heads up battle as we bring you the conclusion of the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown. A starting field of 2010 entrants has narrowed to the final two. Players claimed their share of the $6.4 million dollar prize pool along the way, but our final two players hope to be crowned the ultimate victor, taking home the first place prize of $1 million dollars and having their name forever inscribed on the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: From HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada it’s the WPT Choctaw Final Table where the final six players are competing for the top prize of $486,600 and the title of WPT Champion. Ray Qartomy and Chance Kornuth find themselves in familiar territory as this final table marks the fifth WPT final table appearance for Qartomy and the third for Kornuth. James Hundt Jr will compete at his first WPT final table alongside fan favorite Steve “Cuz” Buckner, poker pro Kristen Foxen, and James Mackey who won this very event in season 15.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Four players remain in the battle for WPT Choctaw Champion. Steve “Cuz” Buckner is fired up and determined to find a way to win his first WPT Title. He is breaking out big bluffs backed by some big talk in hopes of outwitting his final three opponents. Tune in for more WPT Tournament action.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: The fight for first continues at HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada as our four remaining players hope to become a WPT Champion and leave with the first place prize of $486,600. An exciting spectacle so far, the WPT Choctaw final table has even more to offer. Don’t miss James Hundt, Ray Qartomy, Chance Kornuth, and Steve “Cuz” Buckner play for nearly half a million dollars with a WPT Title on the line.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Two players remain, but only one can claim the title of WPT Choctaw Champion. Both Chance Kornuth and Steve “Cuz” Buckner begin this heads up match with nearly even stacks in what promises to be an epic battle. The winner will receive $486,600 and their name forever engraved on the coveted Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup. Tune in to the crowning of a WPT Champion in this epic conclusion of the WPT Choctaw Main Event.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 212: Open #6 Recap, Fleisher Breaks Through, and Overreaction Wednesday Heats Up Open #6 delivered big moments and new storylines, and Around the ACL is breaking it all down. Meesh, Jake, and Mike Hoffman start with Doubles, where Logan Chamberlain and Gavin Cano continue their strong run and add another title. In Singles, it was a breakout performance from Jayce Fleisher, who proves he’s not just a rising name, he’s ready to contend right now. We also recap the rest of the divisions, including Dia Lee in Women’s Singles, Sam Finley / Mikayla Calvey in Women’s Doubles, and another dominant showing from Matt Guy in the Seniors divisions. Then we turn up the heat with Overreaction Wednesday. Are there only a handful of players who can actually win big events? Is Fleisher here to stay at the top? And is the middle tier of pros starting to disappear? Big wins, shifting momentum, and some bold takes, this episode sets the tone for what’s next.

programme.title: Finding Adventure: Worms and Wilderness

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot: Marvel Actor, TikTok Fitness Mom, & Top Comedian Find Thrills at Theme Park

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: More Than A Feeling

programme.title: Stitch: Kindness Within Our Communities

programme.title: Eat Play Stay: Step Up to the Plate in Dubuque, IA
programme.desc: Play ball and stay the night at the Field of Dreams movie site. Take the high road, or track, aboard a funicular railway, then go low when you explore local caverns. Fill up on mini donuts, and find your zen with kava.
